subcodes.first_line: A leaf from among the leaves attained the presence of the Lord of the Covenant and the Luminary of the horizons, and was blessed with hearing. O 'Abdu'r-Ra'uf is thy name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ورقی از اوراق نزد مالک میثاق و نیر آفاق حاضر و باصغا فائز یا عبدالروف اسمت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for service, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
